overview: A modern, single-page agency marketing website for MorseBits, inspired by RapidInnovation's bold dark aesthetic. Features a sticky nav, full-viewport hero, stats bar, service cards, portfolio with category filters, 7-step process timeline, testimonials carousel, blog section, and contact form — all in a dark navy/electric blue color scheme.
features: Sticky nav with smooth-scroll section links and Book a Call CTA
Full-viewport hero with headline, subheadline, and dual CTAs
Client trust strip and 4-metric stats bar
Service cards grid with hover glow effects (Rust, Web3, AI, Email Marketing)
Portfolio with category filter tabs (All, Blockchain, AI, Rust, Web3)
Why Choose Us section with 3 strategic pillars
Responsive footer with links, services, and social icons
